content: سَلّاَكَةُ الْحَوْضِ مِش نَفَعَةٌ وَ الْمَيَاهُ لِسَّه مَوجودَةٌ

transcriptions.arabizi: sallaeka ilhood mish nafaAa wailmayyah lissah mawgooda
